title: Keto Parmesan Oven Baked Tomatoes
ingredients: 4 medium tomatoes, center of stem removed and cut in half
2 slices of Thin slim bread, torn into pieces
½ cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese
instructions:
Using a blender or chopper, process the bread slices into breadcrumbs. Transfer to a medium bowl.
Add the remaining ingredients to the breadcrumbs and toss.
Place the halved tomatoes into a medium foil baking pan, season with salt and pepper. Top each tomato with breadcrumb mixture, be generous.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the topping is golden brown.
